content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit is imported and instantiated (`WallpaperGridView.swift:5` import, `:6` `HMHomeManager()`) but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI (only a category list; description.txt describes only wallpapers).
Pierre: Apple flags HomeKit inclusion without genuine home-accessory functionality as a misuse of the entitlement, which can trigger review questions. Here `HMHomeManager()` is created but never surfaced in any home-control UI, and the metadata makes no mention of home automation. Remove the HomeKit import/entitlement if it isn't actually used, or add the home-related feature that justifies it.
